scripts.dev: concurrently "yarn workspace web dev" "yarn workspace inference dev"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "yarn workspace web dev" "yarn workspace inference dev" "yarn workspace relayer dev"
scripts.start:prod: concurrently "yarn workspace web start" "yarn workspace inference start"
scripts.logs: concurrently "yarn workspace web logs" "yarn workspace inference logs"
scripts.ml:train: cd ml/train && source tf-env/bin/activate && python train_model.py
scripts.ml:train:quick: cd ml/train && source tf-env/bin/activate && python train_model.py --epochs 5 --samples 500
scripts.ml:train:full: cd ml/train && source tf-env/bin/activate && python train_model.py --epochs 10 --samples 1000
scripts.ml:convert: cd ml/train && source convert-env/bin/activate && python -m tf2onnx.convert --saved-model models/saved_model --output models/model.onnx --opset 17 --tag serve --signature_def serving_default
scripts.ml:notebook: cd ml/train && source tf-env/bin/activate && jupyter notebook
scripts.ml:env:tf: cd ml/train && python3.12 -m venv tf-env && source tf-env/bin/activate && pip install --upgrade pip && pip install tensorflow scikit-learn opencv-python pillow matplotlib jupyter
scripts.ml:env:convert: cd ml/train && python3.12 -m venv convert-env && source convert-env/bin/activate && pip install --upgrade pip && pip install tf2onnx onnx onnxruntime
scripts.help: echo "VeriChain Scripts:" && echo "  dev          - Start web + inference services" && echo "  dev:all      - Start all services (web + inference + relayer)" && echo "  build        - Build SDK package" && echo "  test         - Run end-to-end tests" && echo "  setup        - Run setup script" && echo "  status       - Check service health" && echo "" && echo "ML Pipeline:" && echo "  ml:env:tf     - Setup training environment (tf-env)" && echo "  ml:env:convert - Setup conversion environment (convert-env)" && echo "  ml:train      - Train ML model (default settings)" && echo "  ml:train:quick - Quick training (5 epochs, 500 samples)" && echo "  ml:train:full  - Full training (10 epochs, 1000 samples)" && echo "  ml:convert    - Convert SavedModel to ONNX" && echo "  ml:validate   - Validate ONNX export" && echo "  ml:notebook   - Start Jupyter notebook" && echo "  help          - Show this help"
